how-it-works.title: As simple as a deep breath

step-1.title: Sign up in moments
step-1.description: Just share your phone number — that’s all. A simple form, ready in a heartbeat

step-2.title: Your whisper, every evening
step-2.description: Each night, at the same time, a message created by a poet just for you arrives.

step-3.title: Enjoy your moment
step-3.description: Read it slowly, smile, save it — or share it with someone you love. It’s your pause in the day.

how-it-works.mini-CTA: So simple — your first whisper can arrive this very evening
how-it-works.button: Let my first whisper find me

reassurance-box.title: Your phone number stays safe
reassurance-box.description: 7 days free. Cancel anytime — no strings attached

smartphone-notification-section.copy-1: Not random. Not AI. Each whisper is written by hand, crafted by a poet who has spent years shaping emotions into short forms.
smartphone-notification-section.copy-2: They are like little love notes — small enough to fit in a single SMS, yet warm enough to brighten your evening.

testimonials.title: What our readers whisper back…
testimonials.copy: Every line here comes from someone who has already welcomed Evening Whisper into their life. Their words say more than we ever could.

testimonial-1.quote: These whispers are little gems in my day. Sometimes a single sentence is enough to make me feel needed.
testimonial-1.author: Margaret

testimonial-2.quote: I open a message and suddenly the room feels brighter, even though nothing around me has changed.
testimonial-2.author: Patricia

testimonial-3.quote: Evening Whisper feels like a daily letter from life — tender, light, essential.
testimonial-3.author: Eleanor

testimonial-4.quote: My daughter signed me up. Now, every evening I wait for that one line that makes me smile. Best gift ever.
testimonial-4.author: Teresa

testimonial-5.quote: Thanks to them I feel once again like a young girl waiting for a letter from my beloved.
testimonial-5.author: Catherine

testimonial-6.quote: Your whispers are like a cup of tea by the fire — brief, but warming the soul in just the right way.
testimonial-6.author: Dorothy

testimonial-7.quote: Sometimes it feels like the words know exactly what I needed that day.
testimonial-7.author: Helena

testimonial-8.quote: I never knew a text message could feel like a touch — gentle, warm, soothing.
testimonial-8.author: Emily

pricing-section.title: A moment of warmth and kind words

faq-1.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq-1.answer-1: You can cancel your subscription at any time with no cancellation fees.
faq-1.answer-2: There are two ways to do this:
faq-1.answer-3: 1. Once your subscription begins, you’ll receive a message with a link to cancel.
faq-1.answer-4: 2. You can also log in to your account and cancel in the settings section.

faq-2.question: Does the service work without the internet?
faq-2.answer-2: As long as you have mobile signal, your Whispers will arrive.

faq-3.question: Does it work on any phone?
faq-3.answer-2: You don’t need an app to receive your Whispers.
faq-3.answer-3: All that’s required is your phone number.

faq-4.question: Do the messages ever repeat?
faq-4.answer-1: No – every Whisper is unique and written by an experienced poet.

faq-5.question: Is my phone number safe?
faq-5.answer-1: Yes – your phone number is protected.
faq-5.answer-2: We will never share your number with third parties.
faq-5.answer-3: We will never send unwanted messages, adverts or spam.

faq-6.question: Can I gift Whispers to someone else?
faq-6.answer-2: You can buy a subscription for someone special – all you need is their phone number.
